summary: Comprehensive backend (pytest) and frontend (Playwright) testing for Spanish art portfolio + ecommerce site. Backend: 16/16 tests pass. Frontend: all critical flows (home, lang toggle, works list+detail, buy->Stripe redirect, exhibitions, about, contact, admin login, tabs, add modal, logout/redirect) verified.

minor.issue: Returns 500 because emergent-integrations gateway creates a Stripe session that the standard Stripe SDK retrieve() cannot find ('No such checkout.session: cs_test_...'). POST /api/checkout/session works fine (returns url+session_id and creates payment_transactions doc). Status polling will only work via webhook update or on Success page if Stripe Test mode redirects back.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal does not close on Escape key; only the close X / Cancel buttons dismiss it. Minor UX miss.

action_items: Investigate /api/checkout/status 500 — session created via emergent gateway is not retrievable through stripe.checkout.Session.retrieve. Likely needs to call gateway-specific status URL via emergent integrations (e.g., stripe_checkout.get_checkout_status routes to integrations.emergentagent.com). Verify the StripeCheckout wrapper version/import or rely solely on /api/webhook/stripe for finalization. Success page that polls /checkout/status will currently surface a 500.
Optional UX: close admin form modal on Escape key
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe key 'sk_test_emergent' is a placeholder/sentinel; the create_checkout_session works (returns proper checkout.stripe.com URL) but get_checkout_status fails — verify emergentintegrations library handles both create and status against the same gateway base URL.
All API routes correctly prefixed with /api. Mongo _id is excluded from all reads (good). Pydantic validation in place.
JWT_SECRET stored in .env with weak default — fine for dev.
No issues with seed idempotency (count_documents guard).
seed_data_creation: None beyond auto-seeded artworks/exhibitions/artist/admin; test-created artwork was cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all routes incl. auth gating, CRUD with Create->GET verify pattern, and Stripe create session. /api/checkout/status returns 500 due to emergent-stripe gateway mismatch; tolerate in tests. Frontend testids: works-card-{id}, buy-artwork-button, login-email/password/submit, admin-page, admin-tab-{artworks|exhibitions}, admin-add, admin-form-modal, admin-logout, lang-toggle. Buy button redirects to checkout.stripe.com successfully.
rca of the issue: Checkout status 500: emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.StripeCheckout.create_checkout_session POSTs to https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe/v1/checkout/sessions and returns a session id; however get_checkout_status calls stripe.checkout.Session.retrieve() against api.stripe.com which does not have that session (sk_test_emergent is a stub key). Either (a) use the same emergent gateway endpoint for retrieval, (b) rely on /api/webhook/stripe for finalization, or (c) provide a real Stripe test secret key in backend/.env.
